note: 60 new labelled cases written for corpus v2 (SPEC 7.3). Natural-language complaints, no statute wording reuse. Includes Hindi (hi) and Gujarati (gu) cases and hard negatives that surface-match a distractor section. Gold ids reference corpus_v2.json. Reported as a separate row with its own sample size; never replaces golden v1 numbers.

cases.text: The caller said my electricity would be cut unless I installed a screen sharing app, then he moved money out using the banking code he watched me type
An investment group on a chat app showed fake profit dashboards and vanished once I paid five lakh
Someone pretending to be my bank's relationship manager convinced my father to read out the code from his phone
The website looked exactly like the airline's official portal but the tickets it sold never existed
They promised double returns on a crypto platform and blocked my account when I asked to withdraw
A man in a courier uniform asked for a fee to release a parcel that was never real
My landlord's agent collected six months of maintenance money from the whole building and disappeared with it
The accountant quietly moved the society's corpus fund into his personal account over two years
Someone threatened to publish my private photos unless I transferred thirty thousand rupees
The caller said he had kidnapped my son and demanded ransom immediately
Two men on a motorcycle snatched my phone near the market
My wallet was lifted in the crowded bus and the cash inside was gone
A gang rented dozens of savings accounts from villagers and rotated stolen money through them every night
Police found the same five operators running fake customer care numbers across three states for years
The syndicate recruited students to open bank accounts and passed victim money through layer after layer
Someone logged into my email without permission and deleted all my business records
A virus locked every file on our office computers and the attackers wanted payment to unlock them
My company's server was accessed without authorisation and customer data was copied out
He filled a withdrawal slip in my name with a signature that was not mine and took money from my account
The broker gave me a share certificate that turned out to be printed by himself
They produced a rent agreement with my forged signature to claim my shop
A fake letter with the bank's logo and stamp was used to convince the old couple
Someone used my saved card details from a shopping site to buy gadgets
My SIM stopped working and by evening money had left through a duplicate SIM issued in my name
The fraudster changed his voice and spoke like my nephew stranded abroad asking for hospital fees
A video call showed a man in uniform saying my parcel had drugs and I must pay a security deposit
An online seller took full advance for furniture and the shop page disappeared the next day
I was added to a stock tips group where every member praising the scheme was an actor
The loan app agent said my KYC was incomplete and made me reveal the four digit code sent by SMS
The matrimonial profile said he was a surgeon in London and after the engagement gifts he stopped replying
The job portal recruiter collected a registration deposit for interviews that were never scheduled
A scratch card message said I won a car and asked processing charges to release the prize
My internet banking password was changed by someone else and the account was emptied
An unknown device logged into my UPI and approved payments I never made
They cloned the thumb impression from land registry papers and pulled money through the village payment system
The gang leader kept ledgers of which rented account received which victim's transfer
He said he was calling from the telecom regulator and my number would be blocked in two hours
The email pretended to be from my supplier with a changed bank account for the invoice
Our shop's billing computer was tampered overnight and the sales database would not open
A rival planted a program that kept crashing our booking system during the festival rush
The cashier entrusted with the temple donation box used the money for his own bets
The courier boy kept the cash on delivery collections of the whole week instead of depositing them
Late night calls warned that my daughter would be harmed unless I paid protection money
A neighbour walked into my house and took the gold chain lying on the table
बैंक अधिकारी बनकर फोन करने वाले ने मेरी मां से खाते का पासवर्ड पूछ लिया और पैसे निकाल लिए
व्हाट्सएप पर सस्ते सोने का लालच देकर उसने एडवांस पैसे मंगवाए और फिर नंबर बंद कर दिया
मुझे धमकी दी गई कि पैसे नहीं भेजे तो मेरी तस्वीरें रिश्तेदारों को भेज दी जाएंगी
गिरोह ने गांव के लोगों के नाम पर किराए के खाते खोलकर ठगी का पैसा घुमाया
अनजान लिंक पर क्लिक करते ही मेरा फोन हैक हो गया और बैंक की जानकारी चोरी हो गई
पुलिस अधिकारी बनकर वीडियो कॉल पर उसने कहा कि केस बंद करने के लिए जुर्माना भरना होगा
दुकान के मुनीम ने हिसाब के पैसे अपने खाते में डालकर गबन कर लिया
नौकरी दिलाने के नाम पर उसने रजिस्ट्रेशन फीस ली और दफ्तर का पता फर्जी निकला
બેંક અધિકારી હોવાનો ઢોંગ કરીને તેણે મારા પિતા પાસેથી ખાતાનો પાસવર્ડ માંગી લીધો અને પૈસા ઉપાડી લીધા
ઓનલાઈન સસ્તા મોબાઈલની જાહેરાત મૂકીને તેણે એડવાન્સ પૈસા લઈ લીધા અને પછી ફોન બંધ કરી દીધો
પૈસા નહીં આપો તો ફોટા વાયરલ કરવાની ધમકી આપીને તેણે ત્રીસ હજાર માંગ્યા
ટોળકીએ ભાડે લીધેલા ખાતાઓમાં છેતરપિંડીના પૈસા ફેરવ્યા અને દરરોજ રોકડ ઉપાડી
અજાણી એપ ડાઉનલોડ કરાવીને તેણે મારો ફોન કબજે કર્યો અને બેંકના પૈસા ટ્રાન્સફર કરી દીધા
કસ્ટમ ઓફિસર બનીને વીડિયો કોલ પર તેણે કહ્યું કે પાર્સલ છોડાવવા દંડ ભરવો પડશે
મંડળના ખજાનચીએ સભ્યોની બચત પોતાના ધંધામાં વાપરી નાખી
વિદેશમાં નોકરીનું વચન આપીને એજન્ટે લાખો રૂપિયા લીધા અને ઓફિસ બંધ કરીને ભાગી ગયો
